Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
The core engine of the game. Manages the global game state, including players, decks, objectives, and the turn cycle. Handles the execution of player actions and synchronizes the state with the GUI.

    • players

      public static Player[] players

  • Constructor Details

    • GameEngine

      public GameEngine()

  • Method Details

    • reStartGame

      public static void reStartGame()
      Initializes and restarts the game. Sets up players, decks, objectives, and assigns the first turn.

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public static Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Retrieves the player whose turn it currently is.
      Returns:
      The active Player object.

    • getCurrentPlayerIndex

      public static int getCurrentPlayerIndex()
      Retrieves the index of the current active player.
      Returns:
      The integer index (0-3) of the active player.

    • getObjectives

      public static Objective[] getObjectives()
      Retrieves the currently visible objectives on the board.
      Returns:
      An array of the top 3 Objectives.

    • isGameActive

      public static boolean isGameActive()
      Checks if the game is currently ongoing.
      Returns:
      true if the game is active, false if it has ended or hasn't started.

    • nextTurn

      public static void nextTurn()
      Advances the game to the next player's turn. Checks for win conditions, refills action points, and resets temporary buffs/debuffs.

    • drawCard

      public static void drawCard(Player player)
      Allows the current player to draw a random card from the deck. Costs 1 Action Point.
      Parameters:
      player - The player performing the action.

    • playCard

      public static void playCard(Player player, int handIndex)
      Allows the player to play an ActionCard from their hand onto the board. Handles challenge interruptions and action point deduction.
      Parameters:
      player - The player playing the card.
      handIndex - The index of the card in the player's hand.

    • useHeroAbility

      public static void useHeroAbility(Player player, int heroIndex)
      Allows the player to activate a specific hero's ability. Costs 1 Action Point.
      Parameters:
      player - The player owning the hero.
      heroIndex - The index of the hero on the player's board.

    • tryObjective

      public static void tryObjective(Player player, int objectiveIndex)
      Allows the player to attempt to complete an objective on the board. Costs 2 Action Points.
      Parameters:
      player - The player attempting the objective.
      objectiveIndex - The index of the objective on the board (0-2).
